steps.title: Recognize the unit conversion
steps.content: We need to convert 32 kilograms to grams. The given conversion is: 1 kilogram = 1,000 grams.

steps.title: Multiply by the conversion factor
steps.content:
To convert from kilograms to grams, multiply by 1,000:
$$32 \times 1,000 = 32,000$$
The dog's mass is 32,000 grams.
